description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on push and pull request events for specific branches, paths, and tags. The workflow has two jobs: build and wheels. The build job runs on a matrix of Python versions and an Ubuntu OS, setting up Python, installing dependencies, building and installing the package, and testing with pytest. The wheels job runs on Ubuntu, building and testing wheels for multiple architectures, archiving the wheels, and publishing them to PyPI under certain conditions.
